case_title: ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC VS NORTH VALLEY CORP DBA REDDING SEAFOOD RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $836.55 FILED BY ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH VALLEY CORP DBA REDDING SEAFOOD RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH VALLEY CORP DBA REDDING SEAFOOD RESTAURANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTH VALLEY CORP DBA REDDING SEAFOOD RESTAURANT $836.55 PRINCIPAL, $61.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $897.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SHASTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH VALLEY CORP DBA REDDING SEAFOOD RESTAURANT
